name: universal-embedded-workbench
description: Drive a Universal Embedded Workbench (Raspberry Pi ESP32 test bench) from Claude: SDR, signal generator, flashing, OTA, serial, WiFi/provisioning, MQTT, BLE, GPIO, GDB debug.
long_description: Exposes the workbench HTTP API as MCP tools so Claude can operate the bench conversationally. Zero Python dependencies (standard library only) — you only need Python 3 on this machine and network reach to the workbench. Set the workbench URL when you install.

workbench_url.title: Workbench URL
workbench_url.description: Base URL of your workbench, e.g. http://192.168.0.87:8080 (or http://workbench.local:8080). Find it in the workbench portal.
